name: chr1_1p32_microdeletion_SD
description: 1p32.3 region flanking JUN and NFIA with several SDs; site of rare recurrent 1p32 microdeletions/duplications associated with central nervous system malformation phenotypes.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD pair of 20-60 kb at ~94% identity, mediating rare ~1.5-2 Mb CNVs encompassing NFIA, JUN.
